name: consult enforcement uses the same enforce-file engine and the same write-time flags (single-file-gate + include-app-code)
command: grep -q 'enforce-file.sh' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-pre-write.sh" && grep -q 'enforce-file.sh' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh" && grep -q -- '--single-file-gate' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh" && grep -q -- '--include-app-code' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh" && echo same-write-time-engine 1>&2
